_README: Timeline of life events, rendered as an accessible ordered list. Each event needs `year` and `title`; `description` and `icon` (any emoji) are optional. Order doesn't matter — events are sorted by year ascending at render time.

events.title: Started this whole journey
events.description: PLACEHOLDER — first big milestone goes here.

events.title: Picked up photography
events.description: Bought a used camera, never looked back.
